raw_consumer_statement: I noticed unauthorized charges on a rarely used credit card. When I contacted Barclays to alert them of fraud, I also requested a copy of the signed receipt with the details of the store and the purchase. They have refused to provide me with the receipt, and instead told me they verified the charge " directly with the vendor ''. They then closed my fraud investigation. I asked them to reopen the case, and again asked for a receipt, which they refuse to provide. I have hired an attorney who has requested the same, and Barclays refuses to comply. I have now been turned over to a collection agency ; a receipt for the purchase has been requested, and they also refuse to comply. My credit score has dropped over XXXX XXXX
